CHANGES

FORGOT PASSWORD
ADDING ALSO A NEW TABLE FOR FORGOT.
-- Database table for password reset verification codes
-- Run this SQL in your database to create the necessary table

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `password_reset_codes` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `status` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '1=active, 0=used/expired',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `code` (`code`),
  KEY `status` (`status`),
  KEY `expires_at` (`expires_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Stores password reset verification codes';

TRYING TO MAKE A NEW CONTROLLER FOR FORGOT PASSWORD

-- Fix for forgot password feature
-- Run this SQL in phpMyAdmin to add missing columns to register table

-- Add middlename column to register table
ALTER TABLE `register` ADD COLUMN `middlename` VARCHAR(50) NULL AFTER `firstname`;

-- Add birthdate column to register table  
ALTER TABLE `register` ADD COLUMN `birthdate` DATE NULL AFTER `middlename`;

-- Verify the columns were added
-- SELECT * FROM register LIMIT 1;

------------------------------------------------------------
LRN + SCHOOL ID (students table)
Run in phpMyAdmin SQL tab (localhost)
------------------------------------------------------------
-- IMPORTANT FOR TEAMMATES:
-- The SQL statements in this section are the exact commands to run
-- in your local phpMyAdmin database (`bbccolle_beta_bhcaportal`).
-- Copy/paste and execute them in order (1 -> 5).

-- 1) Add School ID column (safe: only if missing)
ALTER TABLE `students`
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `school_id` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `studentno`;

-- 2) Backfill school_id from old studentno values
UPDATE `students`
SET `school_id` = `studentno`
WHERE IFNULL(TRIM(`school_id`), '') = ''
  AND IFNULL(TRIM(`studentno`), '') <> '';

-- 3) Add index for faster login/lookup by School ID
CREATE INDEX `idx_students_school_id` ON `students` (`school_id`);

-- If step 3 errors with "Duplicate key name", use this instead:
-- CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_students_school_id` ON `students` (`school_id`);

-- 4) Verify schema
SHOW COLUMNS FROM `students` LIKE 'school_id';

-- 5) Verify data
SELECT `id`, `user_id`, `lrn`, `school_id`, `studentno`
FROM `students`
WHERE IFNULL(TRIM(`school_id`), '') <> ''
   OR IFNULL(TRIM(`studentno`), '') <> ''
   OR IFNULL(TRIM(`lrn`), '') <> ''
ORDER BY `id` DESC
LIMIT 50;

-- 6) Optional: keep old studentno same as school_id (legacy compatibility)
-- UPDATE `students`
-- SET `studentno` = `school_id`
-- WHERE IFNULL(TRIM(`studentno`), '') = ''
--   AND IFNULL(TRIM(`school_id`), '') <> '';


------------------------------------------------------------
-- Add LRN and School ID columns to register table

ALTER TABLE `register` 
ADD COLUMN `birthdate` DATE NULL AFTER `lastname`,
ADD COLUMN `lrn` VARCHAR(20) NULL AFTER `birthdate`,
ADD COLUMN `school_id` VARCHAR(20) NULL AFTER `lrn`;


-- ADD A NEW COLUMN ON THE students
ALTER TABLE `students` ADD `mother_fbmessenger` VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER `father_fbmessenger`;




SUPERADMIN
USER:noieadmin
PASS:admin123

ADMIN
USER:curtadmin
PASS:admin123

teacher
USER:maquino
PASS:bhcatemp

accounting
user:iponte
pass:bhcatemp

registrar
user:registrar
pass:bhcatemp



--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Classroom System Database Tables for BHCA School System
-- Created: 2026-03-30

-- Table: classroom_classes
-- Stores class information created by teachers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_classes` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `class_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `subject_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `teacher_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `teacher_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `room` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `class_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `school_year` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive','archived') DEFAULT 'active',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ux_class_code` (`class_code`),
  INDEX `idx_teacher_id` (`teacher_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- Table: classroom_students
-- Links students to classes (similar to Google Classroom join)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_students` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `class_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `student_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `student_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `joined_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `status` enum('active','inactive') DEFAULT 'active',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `class_student` (`class_id`, `student_id`),
  INDEX `class_id` (`class_id`),
  INDEX `student_id` (`student_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- Table: classroom_announcements
-- Teacher announcements for each class
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_announcements` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `class_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `teacher_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `priority` enum('normal','important','urgent') DEFAULT 'normal',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `class_id` (`class_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- Table: classroom_activities
-- Activities/assignments given by teachers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_activities` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `class_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `teacher_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `due_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `points` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `attachment_path` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `attachment_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `class_id` (`class_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- Table: classroom_submissions
-- Student activity submissions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_submissions` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `activity_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `student_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `student_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `file_path` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `file_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `comment` text,
  `submitted_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `grade` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `feedback` text,
  `graded_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','submitted','graded','returned') DEFAULT 'submitted',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `activity_student` (`activity_id`, `student_id`),
  INDEX `activity_id` (`activity_id`),
  INDEX `student_id` (`student_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- Table: classroom_meetings
-- Online meeting/schedule for classes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classroom_meetings` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `class_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `teacher_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `meeting_link` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `meeting_platform` varchar(100) DEFAULT 'Google Meet',
  `scheduled_date` date NOT NULL,
  `start_time` time NOT NULL,
  `end_time` time DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `is_recurring` enum('no','daily','weekly') DEFAULT 'no',
  `status` enum('scheduled','ongoing','completed','cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `class_id` (`class_id`),
  INDEX `scheduled_date` (`scheduled_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
